prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **L31 5.7L Gen III V8 (LS1-derived, 225kW/302hp)** with a **GM Performance LS3 6.2L crate engine (LS3 6.2L, 430hp, 424 lb-ft)**, mated to a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** with a **Centerforce Dual Friction clutch (DF144060)** for improved torque capacity and engagement.

Forced Induction: Install a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (2.3L Eaton TVS, 8psi base boost, 550hp+)** with a **custom intercooler setup (PWR Australia bar-and-plate core, 4.5" thick, 1200cfm airflow)** and **ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min)** paired with a **Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump** to support the increased airflow.

Suspension & Handling: Replace the stock suspension with **Pedders GTS ClubSport coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop, polyurethane bushings)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 18mm rear)**. Add **SuperPro adjustable camber arms (front and rear)** and **Nolathane subframe bushings** to eliminate flex under hard cornering. Pair with **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (345mm rotors)** for improved braking performance.
estetica: Body Kit: Install a **Holden Monaro HT-specific **RPM Garage HT GTS Widebody kit** (custom-fabricated steel flares, 3" wider front and rear, bolt-on design)** with **carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon, 3-piece, adjustable angle)** and **custom rear diffuser (RPM Garage, 3D-printed ABS, dual exhaust cutouts)**. Paint in **Holden Heron White (factory code: 197) with matte black accents (3M 1080 Wrap, Satin Black)**.

Wheels & Tires: Fit **Rotiform LAS-R 19x10 +15 front and 19x11 +25 rear wheels (ET +15/+25, 5x120 PCD, 72.5mm CB)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear)** for maximum grip. Use **H&R Trak+10 wheel spacers (10mm front, 15mm rear)** to fill the widened arches.

Interior & Aero: Replace the stock seats with **Sparco Pro ADV racing seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA-approved, 6-point harnesses)** and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub)**. Add a **custom roll cage (RPM Garage, 8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. For aerodynamics, install a **custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 30% weight reduction, functional heat extractor vents)** and **RPM Garage rear wing (dual-element, adjustable angle, 3D-printed carbon fiber)**.
